SEMAA Emergency Response Protocol ERP-2026-01

Organization: SEMAA Marine Operations
Document Type: Operational Protocol
Owner: Safety Director Alice Chen
Effective Date: 2026-02-01
Version: 1.2

Purpose
This protocol defines mandatory response procedures for all declared emergencies aboard SEMAA vessels, including engine casualties, fire, flooding, and man-overboard events. All crew must be familiar with this docume...

...ection Cadence
- Class A vessels must complete a full inspection every 30 days.
- Class B vessels must complete a full inspection every 14 days.
- Emergency inspection is mandatory within 24 hours after any engine overheating event.
